title: Introducing Muse Spark 1.1
excerpt: Meta Superintelligence Labs releases Muse Spark 1.1, a multimodal agentic reasoning model with self-managed 1M-token context, launched alongside the new Meta Model API - the first time Meta has charged for model access.
filter_reason: Major release from Meta: a new agentic multimodal model plus Meta's first-ever paid model API - both capability and strategic news.
summary: Meta Superintelligence Labs released Muse Spark 1.1, a multimodal agentic reasoning model with self-managed 1M-token context, alongside the new Meta Model API. The API is the bigger story: it is the first time Meta has charged for model access, a strategic break from its open-weights-only posture. The combination of long self-managed context and agentic focus also makes the model itself relevant to anyone building or evaluating agent stacks.
